---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
pagetitle: "CV"
title-block-banner: "#771C6D"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: '<meta name="description" content="Curriculum vitae of Serena DeStefani -- postdoctoral fellow in cognitive psychology at The Ohio State University.">'
---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px;">
  <a href="DeStefani_CV.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary">
    <i class="fa fa-download"></i> Download CV (PDF)
  </a>
</div>

<iframe src="DeStefani_CV.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd;">
  <p>Your browser does not support PDFs.
    <a href="DeStefani_CV.pdf">Download the PDF</a> to view it.</p>
</iframe>
